← AEAOS
Cloud Deployment
v2.0.0

Cloud Deployment

AEAOS Cloud · DMS platform/06
The deployment & ops layer. AEAOS Cloud orchestrates existing DMS objects (Tenant / Workspace / Solution) and records deploy + metering events across multi-provider infrastructure.

// Cloud Providers

Registered providers from registry/cloud-store.yaml. Credentials are referenced by URN only — never stored as raw secrets.

// Deployment Flow

A Solution is deployed into an Environment on a Provider. Select a target below (visual mock — no real deploy is triggered). Note: prod is gated and must be reached via promotion (P5).

1 · Solution
→
2 · Environment
→
3 · Provider
AEAOS v2.0.0 — Enterprise AI Agent Operating System
Understand. Decide. Execute. Evolve.
